title: DROP-IN DAY SERVICES - 211info
text: YOUTH CONNECT DROP-IN DAY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community meals six days per week. Offers access to showers, laundry, clothes, computers, internet, and supportive advocates. Provides information about community resources such as education, job training, employment, housing, and LGBTQIA2S+ supports. Hosts regular activities where youth can access resources, explore their artistic talents, join recreation groups, and learn new skills. 43 SE 102 Avenue Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Ages 12-24 homeless and at-risk youth with a focus on LGBTQIA2S+ youth Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-10am, 1pm-3pm, and 4pm-6:30pm, Saturday 1pm-3pm and 4pm-6:30pm. Meals served for the first hour of each shift. Email (503) 432-3986 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 432-3986 Access Center Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Community Meals * Homeless Youth General Clothing Provision * Homeless Youth Homeless Drop In Centers * At Risk Youth Laundry Facilities * Homeless Youth Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homeless Youth Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Youth Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Youth Specialized Information and Referral * At Risk Youth Specialized Information and Referral * Homeless Youth Temporary Mailing Address * Homeless Youth If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YOUTH CONNECT
